title: cerastium octandrum
intro: Cerastium octandrum, also known as starry saxifrage, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerastium octandrum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
